signals.headline: No breaking inflation news confirmed, announced, or resolved RIGHT NOW (April 22, 2026) that would move prediction marke
signals.raw:
No breaking inflation news confirmed, announced, or resolved RIGHT NOW (April 22, 2026) that would move prediction markets.**[1][2][5]

The most recent U.S. CPI data—for **March 2026**—was released on April 10, showing headline inflation at 3.3% y/y (slightly below 3.4% consensus) and 0.9% m/m, driven by a 21.2% gasoline surge from the US-Israel-Iran war; core CPI was milder at 0.2% m/m and 2.6% y
matched_markets: Will annual inflation increase by 3.8% in April?
